title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down four strategies Garry Tan uses with Claude Code to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days: giving Claude a role, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before building. The video references Tan's open-source gstack system and highlights one strategy that draws online criticism while identifying another as a potential game changer.
